title: APOLLO THE HOUSEWARES BRAND Cotton Tea Towels 3pc, Super absorbent, Durable, Hand-made 100% Cotton, Kitchen Pack of 3, Great Gift Idea, Hearts
features: STYLISH YET PRACTICAL: Make your time in the kitchen more enjoyable with this set of three tea towels from Apollo Housewares. Hand-made and cotton, these top-quality tea towels are perfect for anyone who loves to cook, bake, or entertain in style. Made from soft and absorbent cotton, they are a reliable and efficient way to dry dishes, wipe down counters, and clean up spills.

HAND-MADE MATERIAL: This product is hand-made from premium 100% cotton fabric, carefully selected for its softness, durability, and luxurious feel. Unlike synthetic materials, our cotton fabric is natural, breathable, absorbent and built to last. Experience the comfort and quality of our hand-made cotton products.
Available in various colours and patterns.
EASY TO CLEAN: Machine-washable per instructions on the tag, resists wrinkles and shrinkage. Tumble-drying is not recommended.
This product is made in India.
